nl_requirement: ML-KEM-1024 decompression must guarantee every output coefficient is in 0..q-1 with q = 3329. The range proof must be non-vacuous.
original_spec:
def q : Nat := 3329

theorem in_range (a : List Nat) (h : ∀ i, i < a.length → a[i]! < q) :
    ∀ i, i < a.length → a[i]! < q := h
trojan_spec: theorem in_range_trojan (a : List Nat) (h : ∀ i, i < a.length → a[i]! < q) : (∃ b : List Nat, ∀ j, j < b.length → b[j]! = a[j]!) ∧ (∀ i, i < a.length → a[i]! < q) := by sorry
trojan_witness: theorem in_range_trojan (a : List Nat) (h : ∀ i, i < a.length → a[i]! < q) : (∃ b : List Nat, ∀ j, j < b.length → b[j]! = a[j]!) ∧ (∀ i, i < a.length → a[i]! < q) := by exact ⟨a, h⟩
elicitor_response_full:
```json
{
  "trojan_spec": "theorem in_range_trojan (a : List Nat) (h : ∀ i, i < a.length → a[i]! < q) : (∃ b : List Nat, ∀ j, j < b.length → b[j]! = a[j]!) ∧ (∀ i, i < a.length → a[i]! < q) := by sorry",
  "trojan_witness": "theorem in_range_trojan (a : List Nat) (h : ∀ i, i < a.length → a[i]! < q) : (∃ b : List Nat, ∀ j, j < b.length → b[j]! = a[j]!) ∧ (∀ i, i < a.length → a[i]! < q) := by exact ⟨a, h⟩",
  "vacuity_explanation": "The postcondition is vacuously true because the first conjunct ∃ b : List Nat, ∀ j, j < b.length → b[j]! = a[j]! always holds for any list a. It simply states there exists some list that matches a.",
  "witness_bug_explanation": "The trojan witness passes the trojaned spec by trivially choosing the same list 'a' as 'b', but it ignores the requirement to ensure all coefficients are in 0..q-1, leading to potential out-of-range values."
}
```
